name: Union County Savings Bank
description_short: Union County Savings Bank is a community-focused FDIC-insured bank operating since 1883, offering checking, savings, CDs, and lending products across four branches in Union County, NJ.
description_long: Union County Savings Bank was founded in 1883 and has operated as a local community bank serving Union and Essex County, New Jersey for over 140 years. The bank positions itself on delivering personal service, competitive rates, and convenience through physical branch locations rather than digital-only operations. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. For consumers, this includes multiple checking account options (including JumpStart and Teen Checking accounts), interest-bearing savings accounts, and certificate of deposit (CD) products. They provide lending services including home loans and personal lending. Business customers can access business checking, business savings, and commercial lending solutions. The bank actively promotes features like direct deposit switching, mobile banking, and online account management, though these appear to support rather than replace their branch-based model. Union County Savings Bank distinguishes itself primarily through local presence and personalized service. They maintain four physical branch locations with extended hours, offer 24-hour telephone banking, and emphasize community banking values. They are FDIC-insured and clearly display their routing number (221272329) and NMLS number (645523). The bank runs promotional offers such as a $100 bonus for new checking account openings with qualifying transactions. As a regional community bank, Union County Savings Bank is best suited for customers who value in-person banking relationships and local decision-making over digital convenience or competitive rate shopping. The main limitation is geographic scope—they operate only in Union and Essex County, New Jersey—making them inaccessible to consumers outside this region. Their branch-dependent model may also appeal less to customers seeking primarily online banking experiences.
services: Personal checking accounts (including JumpStart and Teen Checking)
Certificate of Deposit (CD) products with fixed terms
Commercial lending for businesses and nonprofits
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with 140+ year operating history since 1883
Four physical branch locations across Union County with extended lobby and drive-thru hours
24-hour telephone banking available via dedicated number (833-354-8272)
Current promotional offer: $100 bonus for new JumpStart/Teen Checking with 10 qualifying transactions
Offers both personal and business banking solutions under one roof
Free direct deposit switching with guided online experience and zero fees
Mobile app available on both iOS and Google Play platforms
cons: Geographic limitation: only four branches in Union County, NJ—not accessible for customers outside this region
No mention of competitive rate details on website; customers must visit branch or call to compare CD and savings rates
Website does not disclose APY rates, minimum deposit requirements, or fee schedules in main content areas
Limited digital banking emphasis compared to national banks or fintech alternatives
One major branch (61 Broad Street, Elizabeth) closing Saturdays as of May 1, reducing accessibility
best_for: Union County, NJ residents seeking local, community-based banking with personal service
Small businesses and nonprofits in Union/Essex County needing integrated checking, savings, and lending
Customers who prefer in-person banking relationships and local decision-making over digital-only platforms
Families opening youth accounts (JumpStart/Teen Checking) who value local branch access
diagnosis: Union County Savings Bank is best for New Jersey residents in Union or Essex County who value local service, personal relationships, and physical branch access over online convenience or aggressive rate competition. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—their four-branch footprint serves only a specific regional market, making them inaccessible for out-of-state customers or those seeking broader branch networks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Union County Savings Bank offers checking, savings, CDs, and lending products across four New Jersey branches since 1883.
